name: Oriental Bar-b-q Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim pork tenderloin of all fat.
2. Combine 1/3 cup soy sauce, 1/3 cup sesame oil, 3 minced garlic cloves, ginger, and MSG (if used) in a deep bowl and mix well to ensure the ginger is not clumping.
3. Place pork into marinade and refrigerate for 6 to 8 hours (overnight if preferred).
4. Remove pork from marinade and place on covered grill.
5. Add wet wood to grill firepan to insure an adequate supply of smoke.
6. Prepare sauce: Combine bar-b-q sauce, 1/3 cup sesame oil, 1/3 cup soy sauce, and 1 minced garlic clove in a bowl and mix well.
7. Serve over sliced pork tenderloins.
